data.title: Qualcomm Rides AI Wave To Record Quarter, But Lowered Q2 Guidance Thanks To Seasonality And Apple Shipments Drags Down Stock
data.description: Qualcomm Inc shares fell 4.6% after market hours over the weak second-quarter guidance despite exceeding analyst expectations.

data.title: Bob Iger Thinks Disney Has An Advantage In Streaming Over Netflix, Amazon: Here's Why
data.description: Disney CEO Bob Iger believes ESPN's 24/7 sports coverage gives the company a major competitive edge over streaming rivals like Netflix and Amazon Prime Video, as Disney prepares to expand ESPN across multiple platforms, including a new flagship streaming service.

data.title: Tesla On Hiring Spree As It Gears To Start Production Of Optimus Robots For Its Own Factories: 'My Team Is Turning Tesla Bot Into A Reality'
data.description: Tesla is looking to hire several engineers and manufacturing technicians as it seeks to ramp up production of its humanoid robot Optimus.

data.title: Jeff Ubben's ValueAct Bet On Meta, Visa And Exited Spotify In Q3: Was It A Clever Move?
data.description: ValueAct added stakes in Meta, Visa, and Live Nation while exiting Spotify. Since Nov. 14, Meta, Visa, and Live Nation gained, but Spotify jumped 29.40% despite the exit.

data.title: Microsoft Poaches Top DeepMind AI Talent Behind Google's Podcasting Feature—Mustafa Suleyman's Zurich AI Lab Expands
data.description: Microsoft has recruited top talent from Google DeepMind for its AI lab in Zurich. This includes Marco Tagliasacchi, Zalán Borsos, and Matthias Minderer, as part of a strategic move by Mustafa Suleyman to improve the company's capabilities in AI development.
